title: Kodular
description: A no-code web-based Android app builder
longDescription: A no-code, web-based Android app builder that lets anyone assemble fully native Android applications using a drag-and-drop interface — no code required. I contributed to the platform powering hundreds of thousands of published apps.

title: VR Compatibility Checker
description: An Android app to test your phone's VR compatibility
longDescription: A Kotlin + Jetpack Compose app that checks whether a phone is VR-ready by probing its sensors, gyroscope, and display capabilities. Published on the Play Store.

title: PlayBadges
description: Show off your Play Store app's downloads and ratings in your repo
longDescription: Generate beautiful, auto-updating README badges for your Play Store apps — downloads, ratings, and version. A hosted service used by hundreds of developers to spruce up their GitHub repos. My most-starred project.

title: based
longDescription: A modern, git-friendly database client built in Rust with the GPUI toolkit. Query and explore PostgreSQL, SQLite, and MongoDB with a fast, keyboard-driven UI that keeps your workflows version-control friendly.

title: kmp-app-updater
longDescription: A Kotlin Multiplatform library that handles checking for updates, downloading, and installing them on Android and Desktop JVM — with pluggable update sources. Ship self-updating KMP apps without reinventing the wheel.

title: useCompose
description: Headless @Composable hooks that drive UI logic
longDescription: Headless, framework-agnostic @Composable hooks that drive UI logic in Jetpack Compose — inspired by TanStack and React hooks. Build reusable, testable state machines for Android UIs.

title: html-preview-action
description: GitHub Action to preview HTML pages in PRs
longDescription: A GitHub Action that deploys a preview of your HTML pages on every pull request so reviewers can see changes live before merging. Drop-in CI for static-site and demo repos.

title: jot
description: A modern Java build tool — cargo for Java
longDescription: A modern Java build tool — like cargo for Rust or uv for Python. A single binary, zero config, fast deterministic builds. Reimagining the JVM build experience without the XML ceremony.

title: cublica
longDescription: A web-based clone of Replicube, a programming puzzle game. Build logic that replicates target shapes — rendered and simulated in the browser.

title: semsearch
description: CLI semantic search engine with BM25 ranking
longDescription: A CLI semantic search engine with BM25 ranking, a web crawler, an NLP pipeline, and a rich terminal UI. Crawl a site and query it from your terminal, fast.

title: sysdesign-wiki
description: An open encyclopedia of system design for popular apps
longDescription: An open encyclopedia of system design and architecture for popular apps — WhatsApp, Instagram, Netflix, Uber, Telegram, Twitter. Copy AI-ready prompts to build your own. Built with Astro on Cloudflare.

title: picsup
longDescription: A full-stack image sharing platform where users upload, share, and browse images. Built with React and a Node backend.

title: folo
description: A social media metrics tracker app
longDescription: A followers and social media metrics tracker app for Android, built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Track your audience growth over time.

title: TaskMate
longDescription: A Trello-style kanban board clone with boards, lists, and drag-and-drop cards. A full-stack web app built to learn React state and real-time sync.

title: REPLisp
description: A LISP interpreter implemented in Rust
longDescription: A mini Lisp-like interpreted language built from scratch in Rust — lexer, parser, evaluator, and a REPL. A fun deep-dive into interpreters and programming-language design.
